description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python cibuildwheel that runs on push to master, main, develop, actions_pypi branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has multiple jobs: set-version sets an output version; python_source builds a source package; python_ubuntu, python_ubuntu_arm, python_windows, and python_macos build wheels for different platforms and Python versions; merge_wheels merges the artifacts; and upload_python_bindings_to_pypi uploads the wheels to PyPI or TestPyPI.
